headline: FICA Tip Credit Preparation Checklist — San Diego
articleBody:
FICA Tip Credit Preparation Checklist for San Diego Clients

Before your FICA Tip Credit appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
